<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="rTno2zCnOw2bDDPVG2ir" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-664" dy="-145" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1300" pageHeight="500" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1F2A36;" value="3 阶张量构建与 CP 分解" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1100" x="100" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="left_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#3A6B8A;" value="（a）3 阶张量 𝓧 ∈ ℝ^(39×14×5)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="380" x="40" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cube_front" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8EFF5;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=2;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="180" x="100" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cube_top" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#D5E2EE;" value=""> <mxGeometry as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="100" y="160" /> <mxPoint x="160" y="120" /> <mxPoint x="340" y="120" /> <mxPoint x="280" y="160" /> <mxPoint x="100" y="160" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cube_right" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=2;" value=""> <mxGeometry as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="280" y="160" /> <mxPoint x="340" y="120" /> <mxPoint x="340" y="300" /> <mxPoint x="280" y="340" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cube_top_fill" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5E2EE;strokeColor=none;strokeWidth=0;rotation=0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="225" x="115" y="105" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="axis1_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#3A6B8A;" value="N₁ = 39
FlappingWingVehicle" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="60" x="40" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="axis1_arrow" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="98" y="358" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="98" y="160" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="axis2_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#3A6B8A;" value="N₂ = 14
Feature
(9 Performance + 5 Equipment)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="42" width="180" x="120" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="axis2_arrow" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="100" y="345" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="282" y="345" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="axis3_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#3A6B8A;" value="N₃ = 5
Mission" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="345" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="axis3_arrow" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="100" y="160" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="340" y="120" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cube_x" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1F2A36;" value="𝓧" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="50" x="170" y="225" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="approx" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=32;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#666;" value="≈" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="430" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="right_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#7E57C2;" value="（b）CP 分解：𝓧 ≈ Σ_(r=1)^R λ_r · u_r ⊗ v_r ⊗ w_r" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="700" x="500" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1_lambda" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#7E57C2;" value="λ₁" vertex="1"> div.div: 本文取 R = 12，相对重构误差 ‖𝓧 − 𝓧̂‖_F / ‖𝓧‖_F ≈ 0.39；FWMAV 嵌入矩阵 U = [u₁, …, u_R] ∈ ℝ^(39×R) 用于 4.4 节的混合相似度 KNN 检索
